rationale: Both reviews correctly block on the same three core issues (True placeholders, IsUnipotent type mismatch), but Review 2 additionally identifies the content-free stub theorem ReductiveGroup.unipotentRadical_trivial' and the derivative trivial instance SemisimpleGroup.instReductiveGroup — both confirmed against the diff — so acting on Review 2 removes more dead scaffolding and leaves a cleaner PR.
